items.title: Red Sox vs. Rangers prediction, odds, time: 2026 MLB picks for Sunday Night Baseball from advanced model
items.summary: SportsLine's model simulated Boston Red Sox vs. Texas Rangers 10,000 times and revealed its MLB predictions and Sunday Night Baseball picks
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Mandhana, Deepti, Ghosh star as India breeze past Pakistan
items.summary: Mandhana top-scored with 68 to lift India from 18 for 2 to 170, their highest in a T20 World Cup against Pakistan
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: England-Croatia referee was called Grade E by Tuchel
items.summary: Clement Turpin is appointed referee for England's opening World Cup game against Croatia on Wednesday - and was once labelled a "Grade E" official by head coach Thomas Tuchel.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
